items.name: Ahmad bin Ismail
items.text: Rented an electric wheelchair for my father after his hip surgery. Delivery was same day and the wheelchair is very easy to use. Highly recommend!

items.text: Bought the lightweight model for my mother. She loves it — so easy to fold and put in the car. The battery lasts all day. Great purchase.

items.text: The rental option is fantastic. RM400/month is very affordable compared to buying. The team even showed us how to operate it. Very professional service.

items.text: My husband needed a wheelchair after his stroke. This electric wheelchair changed his life. He can now move around independently. Thank you!

items.question: How much does it cost to rent an electric wheelchair in Malaysia?
items.answer: Our electric wheelchair rental starts from RM400 per month. No credit card is required — you can pay via online banking. Rental includes delivery, setup, and a demonstration on how to use the wheelchair.

items.question: Can I buy an electric wheelchair instead of renting?
items.answer: Yes! Our electric wheelchairs are available for purchase starting from RM2,400. All purchases come with a 6-month warranty covering the motor, battery, and frame. We also offer installment plans at RM400/month for 12 months.

items.question: How fast is delivery?
items.answer: We offer same-day delivery for orders placed before 2pm within Peninsular Malaysia. East Malaysia (Sabah & Sarawak) delivery takes 2-3 business days. All deliveries include free setup and demonstration.

items.question: Are your electric wheelchairs KKM certified?
items.answer: Yes, all our electric wheelchairs are certified by Malaysia's Ministry of Health (KKM). This ensures they meet safety and quality standards for medical mobility devices.

items.question: Do you offer wheelchair repair services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide full repair services for all electric wheelchair brands. We stock genuine spare parts including batteries, motors, joystick controllers, and tyres. Contact us via WhatsApp for repair pricing.

items.question: What is the weight capacity of your electric wheelchairs?
items.answer: Our standard lightweight models support up to 100kg. For larger users, our heavy-duty model supports up to 120kg with a reinforced steel frame. All models are foldable and fit in most car boots.
